MODDABLE CHESS
Complete Variant Library

Every chess variant, one engine

20Variants
2–6Players
10+Age

Published by Moddable Games · v0.2.0

Variant Library

Moddable Chess includes 20 playable variants spanning classic rules, asymmetric battles, hidden information, and expanded boards. Each variant has its own complete rules page.

Standard Board (8×8)

  • Standard Chess — Classic FIDE rules
  • King of the Hill — King reaches centre = instant win
  • Three-Check — Deliver three checks to win
  • Antichess — Forced captures, lose all pieces to win
  • Racing Kings — No checks allowed, race King to rank 8
  • Fischer Random — 960 randomised starting positions
  • Rifle Chess — Capturing pieces stay on their square
  • Atomic — Captures explode adjacent pieces
  • Marseillais — Two moves per turn
  • Duck Chess — Place a blocker duck after each move
  • Fog of War — Only see squares your pieces attack
  • No Castling — Standard chess, castling disabled
  • Torpedo Chess — Pawns can always double-move
  • Horde Chess — 36 pawns vs a normal army
  • Extinction Chess — Lose when any piece type is eliminated
  • Maharaja & Sepoys — One super-piece vs a full army

Expanded Boards

  • Capablanca Chess — 10×8 with Archbishop + Chancellor
  • Grand Chess — 10×10, same new pieces, bigger stage
  • Courier Chess — 12×8, medieval variant from 1202

Reduced Board

  • Breakthrough — 7×7, pawns only, first to far rank wins
